name: Strawberry-Banana Breakfast Treat
recipeIngredient: 1 package Sweet n Low or Equal (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in blender.
2. Blend until all ingredients are of the same consistency.
This recipe has become my "breakfast" every morning and has really helped me to:
1. stay on a healthy meal plan
2. get fruit into my system
You can use just about any kind of fruit, including pineapple, peaches, apricots, raspberries, or cherries. The only limitation here is your imagination.
